summary: Tested new features for surf photography platform: Watermark Settings CRUD, Selection Queue endpoints, AI Match trigger, and Watermark Preview generation. Backend tests: 17/17 passed (100%). Fixed missing watermark_position column in Profile model and removed invalid business_name reference.

Referenced non-existent profile.business_name attribute - FIXED by removing reference

AI Vision API integration requires OPENAI_API_KEY which may not be set - endpoint handles this gracefully by continuing without AI
